Header file for retrieving metadata information of the flash diagnostic app.

# Purpose
This header file declares a function `flash_diagnostic_app_get_info` that returns a pointer to a `PebbleProcessMd` structure. The function is likely intended to provide metadata or information about a diagnostic application related to a process management system. The inclusion of the `pebble_process_md.h` header file suggests that the `PebbleProcessMd` structure is defined elsewhere and is part of a broader process management library. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the header file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
